pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.8 to 3.0.0 to align with Java 17 baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 requires Java 17; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 is possible but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and native AOT support, and the migration context implies a full upgrade.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0 enforces Java 17 as the minimum version; compiling with Java 11 will fail.
